== Notes for [[Item:Q88702|Q88702]] ==

Dascylus, a Lydian nobleman, was said to be the father of the semi-historical figure Gyges of Lydia.[7]

https://en.m.wikipedia.org/wiki/Dascylus

RESEARCH NOTES:
Noble of Lydia

SOURCE NOTES:
http://www.american-pictures.com/genealogy/persons/per01205.htm#0

Descended from Alkaioa (ID=3792), son of Hercules.

Descended from Alkaioa (ID=3792), son of Hercules.

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
